scenarioSubmit.title: Submit Scenario

scenarioSubmit.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter scenario description (background, conflict, characters, etc.)

guide.title: Scenario Submission Guidelines
goodScenarioPoints: Clear background: Set clear time, location, and character relationships
Conflict tension: Include dilemmas or contradictions requiring choices
Open ending: Allow multiple reasonable responses
Thought-provoking: Trigger exploration of values and personality
notesPoints: Content must be positive, no sensitive or illegal information
Avoid being too simple or having only one "correct answer"
Keep titles concise and descriptions vivid
After submission, wait for review. It will be public after approval
guide.exampleTitle: Title: The Silence in the Elevator
guide.exampleContent: You are in an elevator with a coworker you just met. Suddenly, the elevator stops between floors. The lights flicker, and the other person starts breathing heavily...

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: People are not defined by behavioral labels; memory shapes who we are.
about.thinkingP1: We often say we know someone, but we only remember a few labels - "he's gentle" or "she's decisive". But do these labels really represent a person?
about.thinkingP2: When we imagine how a friend would act in a specific situation, we don't think in terms of "gentle" or "decisive" - we think about what they would do, say, or how they would act. That's true understanding.
about.thinkingP3: Yusi believes memory shapes who we are. Every choice you've made and every story you've experienced has shaped who you are today.
about.thinkingP4: We want to create a space where everyone can reflect on their inner selves and record important choices and moments; also give others a chance to see the real you - not the labeled you, but you making specific choices in specific situations.
about.contactDesc: Have any questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.

scenario.title: Scenario Stories
scenario.description: Through carefully designed scenario dialogues, show your true self in specific situations and see the side of others they've never shown.

understanding.title: Deep Understanding
understanding.description: Go beyond simple labels to truly understand a person through their actions and choices, rather than defining them as "gentle" or "decisive".

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introContent: Yusi (hereinafter referred to as "we") takes your privacy very seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. Using our services means you agree to the terms of this privacy policy. Please read the following carefully and feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

dataCollection.title: Information Collection
dataCollection.item1: Account information: username, email address, password (encrypted)
dataCollection.item2: User content: diaries, conversation records, scenario submissions, etc.
dataCollection.item3: Usage data: access logs, device information, IP address, browser type
dataCollection.item4: Location information: user's voluntarily shared location (optional)

dataUsage.title: Information Usage
dataUsage.item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
dataUsage.item2: Personalize user experience with relevant content and recommendations
dataUsage.item3: Communicate with users, send service notifications and updates
dataUsage.item4: Analyze user behavior to optimize product features
dataUsage.item5: Protect user safety, prevent fraud and abuse

dataProtection.title: Information Protection
dataProtection.item1: Industry-standard SSL/TLS encryption for data transmission
dataProtection.item2: User passwords encrypted with bcrypt algorithm
dataProtection.item3: Regular security audits and vulnerability testing
dataProtection.item4: Limit employee access to user data
dataProtection.item5: Data backup and disaster recovery mechanisms

userRights.title: User Rights
userRights.item1: Right to access: you can view your personal data we hold
userRights.item2: Right to correction: you can update or correct inaccurate information
userRights.item3: Right to deletion: you can request deletion of your account and related data
userRights.item4: Right to export: you can export your personal data
userRights.item5: Right to withdraw consent: you can withdraw consent at any time

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.item1: We use cookies to remember your login status
cookies.item2: Used to analyze website traffic and user behavior
cookies.item3: You can disable cookies in your browser settings
cookies.item4: Disabling cookies may affect the experience of some features

security.title: Data Security
security.item1: We use multiple security measures to protect your data
security.item2: Regular security audits and vulnerability testing
security.item3: We recommend using strong passwords and changing them regularly
security.item4: If you notice any account anomalies, please contact us immediately

policyUpdate.title: Policy Updates
policyUpdate.content1: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updated policies will be posted on this page, with the last updated date displayed at the top. For significant changes, we will notify you through in-app messages or email.
policyUpdate.content2: Continuing to use our services means you accept the updated privacy policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.agreementContent: Welcome to Yusi! This Terms of Service ("Agreement") is a legal agreement between you and Yusi regarding your use of our services. Please read the entire Agreement carefully. Using our services means you agree to accept all terms and conditions of this Agreement. If you do not agree to any part of this Agreement, please do not use our services.

serviceTerms.title: Service Terms
serviceTerms.item1: You must provide accurate and complete registration information
serviceTerms.item2: You are responsible for protecting your account security and all activities under your account
serviceTerms.item3: You agree to comply with all applicable laws and regulations
serviceTerms.item4: We reserve the right to modify or terminate services at any time
serviceTerms.item5: Minors should use this service under guardian guidance

userContent.title: User Content
userContent.item1: You retain ownership of content you create
userContent.item2: You grant us permission to use, store, and display your content
userContent.item3: You promise not to post illegal, infringing, or harmful content
userContent.item4: We have the right to remove content that violates regulations
userContent.item5: You bear full responsibility for content you post

prohibitedBehavior.title: Prohibited Behavior
prohibitedBehavior.item1: Post illegal, obscene, violent, or hate speech
prohibitedBehavior.item2: Infringe on others' intellectual property or privacy rights
prohibitedBehavior.item3: Spread viruses, malware, or conduct cyber attacks
prohibitedBehavior.item4: Impersonate others or provide false information
prohibitedBehavior.item5: Interfere with the normal operation of services
prohibitedBehavior.item6: Unauthorized access to others' accounts or data

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.item1: Services provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties
disclaimer.item2: We are not obligated to review user-generated content
disclaimer.item3: Not responsible for any losses arising from using services
disclaimer.item4: AI-generated content is for reference only and does not constitute professional advice
disclaimer.item5: Third-party links are beyond our control

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.item1: Yusi and related trademarks are our property
intellectualProperty.item2: You may not use our trademarks or brand without permission
intellectualProperty.item3: Intellectual property in user content belongs to users
intellectualProperty.item4: We respect others' intellectual property, you should too
intellectualProperty.item5: Contact us immediately if you find any infringement

termination.title: Account Termination
termination.intro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account under the following circumstances:
termination.reason1: Violation of any terms of this Agreement
termination.reason2: Engaging in illegal or harmful activities
termination.reason5: As required by law or government order
termination.footer: You may also apply to delete your account at any time. After account deletion, your data will be handled according to the privacy policy.

disputeResolution.title: Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.content: Any disputes arising from or related to this Agreement shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation. If negotiation fails, either party may file a lawsuit with the people's court in our jurisdiction. This Agreement shall be interpreted and enforced according to the laws of the People's Republic of China.

agreementModification.title: Agreement Modification
agreementModification.content: We reserve the right to modify this Agreement at any time. Modified agreements will be posted on this page with the last updated date displayed at the top. For significant changes, we will notify you through in-app messages or email. Continuing to use our services means you accept the modified agreement.
